'''sachuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whaikorero|whaikorero]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whaikorero|whaikorero]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sachuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæchizhith|sæchizhith]] || [[word:sæchizhij|sæchizhij]] || [[word:sæchizhish|sæchizhish]] || [[word:sæchizhi|sæchizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sachuchuzhuth|sachuchuzhuth]] || [[word:sachuchuzhuj|sachuchuzhuj]] || [[word:sachuchuzhush|sachuchuzhush]] || [[word:sachuchuzhu|sachuchuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sachuzhuth|sachuzhuth]] || [[word:sachuzhuj|sachuzhuj]] || [[word:sachuzhush|sachuzhush]] || [[word:sachuzhu|sachuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sachufzhuth|sachufzhuth]] || [[word:sachufzhuj|sachufzhuj]] || [[word:sachufzhush|sachufzhush]] || [[word:sachufzhuf|sachufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sachuzhuthu|sachuzhuthu]] || [[word:sachuzhuju|sachuzhuju]] || [[word:sachuzhushu|sachuzhushu]] || [[word:sachuzhuku|sachuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sachuzhuth|sachuzhuth]] || [[word:sachuzhuj|sachuzhuj]] || [[word:sachuzhush|sachuzhush]] || [[word:sachuzhu|sachuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sachuzhuthul|sachuzhuthul]] || [[word:sachuzhujul|sachuzhujul]] || [[word:sachuzhushul|sachuzhushul]] || [[word:sachuzhukul|sachuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sachuzhuthuthu|sachuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:sachuzhujuju|sachuzhujuju]] || [[word:sachuzhushushu|sachuzhushushu]] || [[word:sachuzhuku|sachuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sachuzhuthun|sachuzhuthun]] || [[word:sachuzhujun|sachuzhujun]] || [[word:sachuzhushun|sachuzhushun]] || [[word:sachuzhukun|sachuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sachuzhuthuoro|sachuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:sachuzhujuoro|sachuzhujuoro]] || [[word:sachuzhushuoro|sachuzhushuoro]] || [[word:sachuzhukuoro|sachuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
